title: Use reversed view for reverse iteration
description: When iterating over collections in reverse order, use a reversed view instead of creating a reversed copy. This approach improves performance and reduces memory usage, making the code more efficient and maintainable.
recommendation: Refactor reverse iteration to use a reversed view of the collection rather than copying or manually reversing elements.

checks.message: Refactor reverse iteration to use a reversed view of the collection rather than copying or manually reversing elements.
